title: [Cloud] Flamingo/Spoonbill - Connect headset as standalone
scenario: Voyager Legend 50/30 standalone pairing shows correct device name and earpiece-only details in Poly Studio Mobile app and cloud portal
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap Add Device or Pair New Device
Put Poly Voyager Legend 50 (or Legend 30) headset into pairing mode (press and hold Bluetooth button until LED flashes red/blue)
Select the headset from the list of available devices to pair
Verify the device appears in the Home screen under My Devices
Tap on the device name to open Device Settings
Verify the device name displayed matches "Voyager Legend 50" or "Voyager Legend 30"
Log in to the Poly cloud web portal
Navigate to the Devices or My Devices section
Locate the paired Voyager Legend 50 or Legend 30 device in the device list
Verify the cloud portal displays the device name as "Voyager Legend 50" or "Voyager Legend 30"
Click on the device to open its details page
Verify the details page shows only earpiece information (no charging case details)
Verify the details page displays an image of just the earpiece (not the case)
expected: The Poly Voyager Legend 50 or Legend 30 headset appears correctly in the Poly Studio Mobile app with the correct device name. The cloud web portal displays the device as "Voyager Legend 50" or "Voyager Legend 30", and the details page shows only earpiece information and an image of just the earpiece.
